message:
feat(fp-frame): add row-wise var/std to DataFrame.apply, refine clip and test precision

Add sample variance ("var") and standard deviation ("std") as row-wise
apply functions for DataFrame, using Bessel-corrected (N-1) formula with
NaN fallback for insufficient observations. Refactor Series::clip to use
let-chains for cleaner guard logic. Harden abs/round tests to use
epsilon comparisons instead of exact float equality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
